The Problem

Your Patients Are Dropping Off PAP Therapy

The industry focuses on 90-day compliance. That's where most programs stop. But research shows many patients need at least 6 months to build lasting PAP habits.

The Solution

Purpose-Built Sleep RPM Software

Behavior Change by Design

Platform

Patient Dashboard Overview

  • Search patients by name instantly
  • Filter by status: Outreach Active, Needs Attention, On Track, Disenrolled
  • At-a-glance metrics: Usage, AHI, Leak, Pressure
  • Monthly stats with billable time tracking

Everything your team needs to manage patients — in one view.

Workflow

Get My Next Patient — Work Smarter

  • Intelligent prioritization presents the patients that need help at the right time
  • Alert status → Trending non-adherent → Scheduled follow-up → On-track
  • Built-in encounter timer and note-taking
  • On-Hold and Disenroll options at your fingertips

Interventions

Guided Interventions — No Clinical Staff Required

  • Triggered by objective data + searchable subjective data
  • Dynamic search: symptoms, troubleshooting, FAQs, comorbidities
  • Pre-written scripts designed for non-clinical delivery
  • Send intervention suggestions directly to patients via text

Your team resolves issues faster, escalates less, and keeps patients on therapy.

Revenue

RPM Billing Made Simple

CSV Superbill

  • Complete billing delivered by the 10th of each month
  • Tracks CPT codes: 99453, 99454, 99457, 99458, 99445, 99470
  • Monitoring days, encounter time, call time, total time

Individual Patient PDFs

  • Uploaded to each patient's record
  • Easy to drop into your EHR
  • Supports provider review and treatment plan updates
Clean billing documentation = faster reimbursement, fewer denials and successful audits.

09 / 11
Getting Started

We Make It Easy to Launch

Phase 1

Existing Patients

Outreach to patients set up on PAP in the last 12 months — ringless voicemail and text enrollment campaigns to enroll interested patients in monitoring program.

Phase 2

New Patients

Identify RPM-eligible patients and enroll during visits. Seamless integration into your existing workflow.

Phase 3

Staff Training

We help identify your program lead, develop staffing metrics, and train your team virtually or onsite.

Ongoing

Continuous Support

Staffing guidance, billing support, payer insights, and compliance guidance — we're with you long-term.
